final_prompt.prompt:
Create a photorealistic product shot of a sapphire diamond-encrusted ring, showcasing extreme close-up jewelry detail against a black velvet backdrop.

Style/medium: photorealistic macro jewelry photography, studio product shot in the spirit of high-end Cartier or Tiffany campaign imagery, hyper-detailed gemstone rendering
Composition: extreme close-up macro framing, slight three-quarter angle to capture facet play, shallow depth of field with sharp focus on the sapphire center stone
Subject: sapphire solitaire ring with diamond pavé setting, deep royal-blue sapphire center stone with vivid internal fire and light refraction, brilliant-cut diamonds catching and scattering light
Scene/backdrop: pure black velvet surface and background, seamless dark void that isolates the ring
Lighting/mood: focused studio spot lighting angled to trigger internal refraction within the sapphire, producing spectral fire — violet, cobalt, and electric-blue caustic flares inside the stone; secondary rim light to define the metal band edges; luxurious and opulent mood
Color palette: deep royal blue as dominant anchor, white diamond sparkle as contrast, warm gold or cool platinum metal as structural tone, all against absolute black
Materials/textures: mirror-polished metal band with visible reflection, individual diamond facets with sharp light breaks, sapphire surface showing depth and internal light scatter, black velvet with subtle pile texture
Avoid: plastic-looking gemstones, flat or dull stone color, overexposed blown-out highlights, generic jewelry render aesthetic, watermark, stuffer 8K tags
